case_title: GARY TSIFRIN ET AL VS. IAN DUGGAN ET AL

PARTIAL OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL OF PETITION PURSUANT TO CCP 473(B) (TRANSACTION ID # 61905966) FILED BY RESPONDENT DUGGAN, IAN

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONERS GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG-TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, AND CLAUDIA WINTER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL. THIS MATTER IS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM FAILURE TO FILE OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED PER CCP 473(B). NO LATER THAN MAY 11, 2018 DARON TONG SHALL REMIT TO CLARK HILL LLP $2,600 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS TO COMPENSATE FOR EXTRA WORK AND COSTS CAUSED BY MR. TONG'S FAILURE TO FILE A TIMELY OPPOSITION. RESPONDENT MAY SET ITS MOTION TO DISMISS FOR HEARING PER CCP 1005 AND CCP 1013. PETITIONER IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B IN FUTURE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS GARY TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, CLAUDIA WINTER, FRANCESCA WONG'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND OBTAIN JUDGMENT ON AWARD

This matter is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Petition To Confirm Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENTS IAN DUGGAN, DAPHNE WONG'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE STAY PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION

Appearances: David M. Perl of Clark Hill (415.984.8538) for respondents and moving parties; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. This action is stayed until related action is resolved in arbitration. Wong shall file response within 10 days of this order. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG-TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, CLAUDIA WINTER, FRANCESCA WONG'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND OBTAIN JUDGMENT ON AWARD

Appearances: David M. Perl of Clark Hill (415.984.8538) for respondents and opposing parties; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. Petitioner shall set Petition for hearing (if proper) upon the resolution of the related case in arbitration and after Wong's response is on file or Wong has been defaulted. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Petition To Confirm Arbitration
Off Calendar May-31-2018 Continued To Jun-21-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: RESPONDENTs IAN DUGGAN and DAPHNE WONG's Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Petition To Confirm Arbitration is continued to June 21, 2018. Moving party failed to provide curtesy copies. (Super. Ct. San Francisco County, Local Rules, rule 2.7.) Moving party shall provide curtesy copies by June 8, 2018 with a cover sheet indicating the new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jun-21-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERs GARY TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, CLAUDIA WINTER, and FRANCESCA WONG's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award And Obtain Judgment On Award is Continued to June 21, 2018 pursuant to agreement of all counsel's as stated in the Notice of Motion filed on May 10, 2018. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS GARY TSIFRIN, FRANCESCA WONG-TSIFRIN, JEFF WINTER, AND CLAUDIA WINTER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL

Appearances: David M. Perl of Clark Hill LLP (415.984.8538) for respondent Ian Duggan; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for relief from failure to file opposition to motion to Dismiss is GRANTED per CCP 473(b). No later than May 11, 2018 Daron Tong shall remit to Clark Hill LLP $2,600 in reasonable attorney's fees and costs to compensate for extra work and costs caused by Mr. Tong's failure to file a timely opposition. Respondent may set its motion to dismiss for hearing per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Petitioner is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Order signed. Judge: Suzanne Ramos Bolanos, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/SRB)

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT IAN DUGGAN'S MOTION TO DISMISS.

Appearances:
Daron D. Tong of Miller & Tong LLP (415.409.5222) for plaintiff and responding party; David M. Perl of Clark Hill (415.984.8538) for respondent and moving party.

Discussed as to the issue of no opposition. Petitioner indicates he may file a CCP 473 motion. The Court takes the matter under submission. Each side to submit a proposed form of order for the Court's consideration. Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)
